steps.title: Link vision to design
steps.content: Keller conceived the mall as an indoor version of a European town square that encouraged people to stroll and linger. The next sentence describes design features that put that vision into practice.

steps.title: Reject weak or opposite links
steps.content: A merely adds information, while B and D suggest opposition. The sentence needs a transition showing that the promenades and seating areas followed logically from Keller's town-square concept. The answer is C.
